summary.zh: 识别一次 session 内连续或多轮用户纠偏形成的 correction loop。
summary.en: Detects repeated or multi-turn user corrections that form a correction loop in one session.

when_to_use.zh: 当需要发现 Agent 在同一任务中被用户反复纠偏、反复校正方向时使用。
when_to_use.en: Use this to find cases where the Agent is repeatedly corrected or redirected within the same task.

limitations.zh: 教学式对话和探索式讨论也可能出现多轮纠偏，需要结合任务类型和最终结果判断。
limitations.en: Tutorial-style or exploratory conversations can also contain multi-turn corrections; interpret with task type and outcome.

privacy.zh: 只读取标准化 SessionEnvelope 的用户回合内容，不输出 raw private content。
privacy.en: Reads only standardized SessionEnvelope user turns and does not output raw private content.
